step_by_step_thinking:
\boxed{{}}
We are given that a 13-month-old boy presents with hepatosplenomegaly, milky blood that separates into a creamy layer upon refrigeration, and a genetic mutation in the **apolipoprotein C-II** gene (**APOC2**) on chromosome 19.
raw_response:
\boxed{{}}
We are given that a 13-month-old boy presents with hepatosplenomegaly, milky blood that separates into a creamy layer upon refrigeration, and a genetic mutation in the **apolipoprotein C-II** gene (**APOC2**) on chromosome 19.
